decision: Pass via fallback gate: source compiles, full tests pass, production build passes, and lint failures are documented repository/touched-file baseline debt unrelated to this cycle’s className viewport-unit and CSS-only changes.
known_issues: Repository-wide pnpm lint currently reports baseline strict TypeScript lint debt (201 errors, 37 warnings).

Focused changed-file lint still reports baseline issues in existing touched files; disabling the known no-unnecessary-condition baseline leaves 6 errors and 30 warnings from import/order, sort-imports, no-shadow, require-await, and missing react-hooks rule config.
ESLint does not validate src/styles.css semantics; pnpm build is the CSS gate for this cycle.
